title: Corentin Le Cam

{{Short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography | name = Corentin Le Cam | fullname = Corentin Le Cam | image = | image_size = | birth_date = {{birth date and age|df=yes|1999|6|8}} | birth_place = [[Perpignan]], Pyrénées-Orientales,
Occitania, France |height = {{convert|2.08|m|ftin|0|order=flip|abbr=on}} |weight = {{convert|118|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} | position = {{rlp|PR|SR|LF}} | first = RL | club1 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} | year1start = 2021 | year1end = 22 | appearances1 = 11 | tries1 = 0 | goals1 = 0 | fieldgoals1 = 0 | points1 = 0 | club2 = {{nowrap|→ [[Whitehaven RLFC]]}} | year2start = 2022{{small|(loan)}} | year2end = | appearances2 = 2 | tries2 = 1 | goals2 = 0 | fieldgoals2 = 0 | points2 = 4 | club3 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} | year3start = 2023 | year3end = | appearances3 = 1 | tries3 = 0 | goals3 = 0 | fieldgoals3 = 0 | points3 = 0 | club4 = {{nowrap|→ [[Saint-Estève XIII Catalan|St Estève]]}} | year4start = 2023{{small|([[Rugby league dual registration|DR]])}} | year4end = | appearances4 = 10 | tries4 = 5 | goals4 = 0 | fieldgoals4 = 0 | points4 = 0 | ru_club1 = {{nowrap|[[Céret Sportif Vallespir]]}} | ru_year1start = 2022 | ru_year1end = 23 | ru_appearances1 = 3 | ru_tries1 = 0 | ru_goals1 = 0 | ru_fieldgoals1 = 0 | ru_points1 = 0 | teamA = {{rlnt|France}} | yearAstart = 2022 | yearAend = | appearancesA = 6 | triesA = 5 | goalsA = 0 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 4 | new = yes | source = [https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/corentin-le-cam/summary.html Rugby League Project] | updated = 27 July 2023 }} '''Corentin Le Cam''' (born 8 June 1999) is a French [[rugby league]] & [[rugby union]] footballer who plays as {{rlp|sr}} forward for [[RC Albi XIII]] in the [[Super XIII]]. He previously played for [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He is the tallest man ever to play [[English Super League]]{{citation needed|date=April 2025}} at 209 cm. Corentin scored a try against England in the end of year test against [[England]]. He was “one of the players to watch” for [[France]] in the delayed [[2021 Rugby League World Cup]]. In 2021 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58123964|title=Super League: St Helens 34-12 Catalans Dragons - Saints beat Dragons to close gap at top|publisher=BBC|date=7 August 2021|accessdate=1 August 2022}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-289-le-cam-corentin/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/corentin-le-cam/ France profile] {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Le Cam, Corentin}} [[Category:1999 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:AS Saint Estève players]] [[Category:Racing Club Albi XIII players]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:French rugby union players]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Perpignan]] [[Category:Whitehaven R.L.F.C. players]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] {{France-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
